deviations.description: The process model continues to require donor monitoring after blood collection for the duration of bleeding, even though Version 2 has removed this obligation. The process enforces a constraint that is no longer required by the updated compliance requirement.

The process model enforces that donor monitoring must follow blood collection, but Version 2 no longer obligates this sequence. The process unnecessarily restricts behavior by maintaining this outdated control flow requirement.
process_model_reference: sequence: blood collection followed by donor monitoring

deviations.description: The process model enforces that the duration of donor monitoring must match the duration of bleeding, but Version 2 has removed this temporal constraint. The process continues to enforce a time-based restriction that is no longer required.
